name: Vai lung thlân
author: AGP
description: A Mizo (Mizoram, NE India) single-lap sowing game recorded by Shakespear (1912). Sow all stones from one of your six holes around the 12-hole board; land the last stone in an empty hole to capture it plus the unbroken chain of single stones behind it. Most stones wins; 30-30 is a draw.
